title: Berlin on a Monday - Quick Summary
items: **Berlin on a Monday is not closed, but many major state museums are.** Do not plan your first Monday around Museum Island interiors without checking official hours.
**Good Monday anchors include Humboldt Forum, Berlinische Galerie and Futurium,** which normally close on Tuesday instead.
**Outdoor Berlin still works well on Monday:** Alexanderplatz, St. Mary’s Church, Museum Island exteriors, the Spree, Brandenburg Gate and the Reichstag area.
**The Reichstag dome is free but needs registration,** and the TV Tower is a paid fallback for a high view if visibility is good.
**Use Monday as a lighter planning day:** one open anchor, one walk, one food break and one flexible backup is better than a museum marathon.
